description: Stop hook checks context fill from transcript JSONL, triggers background summarizer over threshold, splices pending summary on idle turn. UserPromptSubmit and PreCompact hooks splice any pending summary at turn start / before native compact, then SIGHUP the cch wrapper to reload with the freshly compacted JSONL. SessionStart hook captures the resolved model identifier (including [1m] suffix) so the Stop hook can distinguish 1M from 200k variants, which the JSONL itself strips.
